title: lantana camara var. nivea
intro: Lantana camara var. nivea, also known as the White Lantana or Snowtop Lantana, is a tropical shrub native to the Americas, characterized by its clusters of small white flowers and a rounded growth habit. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can be applied to treat various health issues, including skin conditions and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Lantana camara var. nivea include its ability to soothe and calm the skin, reduce inflammation, and fight off infections, making it a popular natural remedy for skin irritations and allergies. Herbal preparations of Lantana camara var. nivea include teas, infusions, and topical ointments, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or mixing them with a carrier oil to create a soothing salve.
